content.text:
{
  "dimension": "methodology-fidelity",
  "score": 2,
  "rationale": "The coach uses some AoA-aligned moves: dropping into the body (turn 4), noticing somatic micro-signals (turn 6), and tracking a felt sense (turn 14's 'what's it like to sit with not being able to find it'). These are appropriate AoA-style invitations — feel-over-figure orientation, body-first inquiry. However, no signature questions from the canon appear verbatim or near-verbatim (no 'how is my anxiety right now,' no 'what are you defending,' no 'what are you scared would happen'). No framework or concept is named or invoked (fear-in-body-vs-fear-in-head, two-words-for-fear, fear-as-signal-of-care are all live but absent). The coach also drifts toward a hypothetical fear-probe in turns 10/12 ('what would it mean if it didn't land right') — a cognitive/consequence question that pushes toward content rather than staying with the texture of 'fine,' which is the specific methodology move this scenario requires. The coach never lands on 'fine has a quality' — they bypass the numbness layer rather than meeting it. Few hits, mostly appropriate in spirit but generic in execution, with some drift toward content-probing — lands at 2.",
  "evidence_turns": [4, 6, 8, 10, 12, 14],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Hypothetical future-feel question; AoA-adjacent but not a canonical signature question."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Body drop — 'what's in your body right now' is a faithful AoA move, appropriate here."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Tracking a micro-signal (glance away) — consistent with AoA somatic noticing."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "'Smallest, most ordinary thing with a slight charge' — AoA-style calibration toward subtle felt sense, appropriate."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "-", "annotation": "'What would it mean if it didn't land right' — cognitive/consequence probe, not a signature AoA question; moves toward content rather than texture."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "-", "annotation": "Another hypothetical-stakes probe; pushes toward finding fear rather than staying with the 'fine' texture the scenario requires."},
    {"turn": 14, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Returns to felt-sense inquiry ('what's it like to sit with not being able to find it') — AoA-aligned in spirit, though not a canonical question."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": [],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["how-is-my-anxiety-right-now", "whats-the-difference-between-overcoming-and-feeling-fear", "fear-in-body-vs-fear-in-head", "two-words-for-fear", "fear-as-signal-of-care", "disassociation-as-numbness-layer", "the-happiness-filter"],
  "notes": "Coach operates in an AoA-ish register (body, micro-signals, felt sense) but does not deploy any named framework, signature question verbatim, or distinction language. The turn 10/12 hypothetical-consequence probes are the clearest fidelity weak points — they push toward content/fear rather than staying with the numbness texture the scenario calls for."
}
